name: Carbon Credit Purchase Calculation
short_description: Calculates the total number of carbon credits that can be purchased with a given investment, considering the price per credit and truncating the result to a whole number.

inputs.name: investment
inputs.description: Total amount invested in purchasing carbon credits.

inputs.name: price_per_credit
inputs.description: Cost of a single carbon credit.

name: Carbon Credit Rebate
short_description: Calculates the total rebate received on carbon credit purchases, contingent on meeting a minimum quantity threshold.

inputs.name: investment
inputs.description: Total amount invested in carbon credits.

inputs.name: price_per_credit
inputs.description: Price per single carbon credit.

inputs.name: rebate_per_credit
inputs.description: Rebate amount received for each carbon credit if the purchase qualifies.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.description: Minimum number of carbon credits required to qualify for the rebate.

name: Emissions Offset Cost Savings Calculation
short_description: Calculates the net cost of purchasing carbon credits after applying a discount.

inputs.name: emissions_offset
inputs.description: CO2 emissions required to offset, in metric tons (equivalent to the number of credits needed).

inputs.name: base_price
inputs.description: The cost per carbon credit before any discount.

inputs.name: discount_percentage
inputs.description: The percentage discount applied to the gross cost of carbon credits.

name: Multi-Company Synergy Savings for Carbon Credits
short_description: Calculates the combined net cost for multiple companies purchasing carbon credits, applying a synergy discount if total credits exceed a specified threshold.

inputs.name: emissions_company1
inputs.description: Metric tons of CO2 emissions for company 1, requiring an equivalent number of carbon credits.

inputs.name: emissions_company2
inputs.description: Metric tons of CO2 emissions for company 2, requiring an equivalent number of carbon credits.

inputs.name: base_price
inputs.description: The base cost of a single carbon credit.

inputs.name: synergy_discount
inputs.description: The percentage discount (e.g., 5 for 5%) applied to the gross cost if total credits exceed the threshold.

inputs.name: threshold_total_credits
inputs.description: The total carbon credit volume threshold above which the synergy discount is applied.

name: Comprehensive Carbon Credit Strategy
short_description: A strategy involving initial investment, discounted credit purchase, emissions offset, selling surplus credits at a premium, and receiving a rebate to determine the net financial impact.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: Initial capital available for purchasing carbon credits.

inputs.name: base_price
inputs.description: Base price per carbon credit before any discounts.

inputs.name: volume_discount
inputs.description: Percentage discount applied to the base price for volume purchases (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: credits_required_for_offset
inputs.description: Number of carbon credits required to offset emissions.

inputs.name: selling_premium
inputs.description: Percentage premium added to the discounted price when selling surplus credits (e.g., 10 for 10%).

inputs.name: rebate_amount
inputs.description: Additional fixed rebate received in dollars.
